text:
Back to         Policy

Implementation and Accountability

A National Housing Emergency declaration would unlock federal land, funding, and coordination powers. Every initiative in this plan will be tracked through annual public reporting on units built, affordability, and impact. Housing should be measured in homes built and lives changed, not just market prices.
